/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/solver_exe.dir/linear.cpp.o CMakeFiles/solver_exe.dir/Solver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/solver_exe.dir/SolverPhysics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/solver_exe.dir/MathSolver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/solver_exe.dir/Grid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/solver_exe.dir/ShapeFunction.cpp.o -o solver_exe  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgsl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgslcblas.so
